clues: The desktop background has been set to a solid black color and cannot be changed.
A watermark in the bottom-right corner of the screen says 'Activate Windows'.
Personalization settings in Windows open only to show a message about activation.
The watermark appeared after a major hardware change was made to the computer.
Windows Activation shows 'Error: 0xC004F211' indicating a hardware change has invalidated the license.
